source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT  
COALESCE((SELECT MAX(Location_PK) FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION),2000) + 
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY M1.LocationName DESC) AS Location_PK,
CASE 
	WHEN M1.Division = 'E.Home Smart'			THEN 'HSI'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'G.Pacific Bath'		THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'D.Paradise'			THEN 'PHI'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'C.Mad City'			THEN 'MAC'
	WHEN M1.Division = '0.Renuity'				THEN 'REN'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'G.Pacific Gutter'		THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'H.Rite Window'			THEN 'RTW'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'B.Statewide'			THEN 'SWR'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'I.Home Organization'	THEN 'CTA'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'A.FHIA'				THEN 'FHI'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'F.Max Home'			THEN 'MXH'
	END AS Division,
	'Employee HeadCount File' AS DataSource,
	'NA' AS LocationType,
	M1.LocationName AS LocationName,
	M1.Market,
	M1.MarketFinancialReporting,
	M1.Acumatica,
	M1.DivisionFinancialReporting,
	M1.Regions,
	GETDATE() AS RecordCreatedDate,
	GETDATE() AS RecordUpdatedDate
FROM  
	(
		SELECT * FROM 
			(
				SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY LocationName ORDER BY ReportDate DESC) AS RW,* 
				FROM ODS.HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION
					) MX
				WHERE RW=1

			) M1 
			
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION ME 
	ON M1.LocationName = ME.LocationName
	AND ME.DataSource = 'Employee HeadCount File'

	WHERE ME.LocationName IS NULL

SELECT 
COALESCE((SELECT MAX(Location_PK) FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION),2000) + 
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY M1.LocationName DESC) AS Location_PK,
'ALL' AS Division,
'Employee Timecard File' AS DataSource,
M1.LocationType,
M1.LocationName,
NULL AS Market,
NULL AS MarketFinancialReporting,
NULL AS Acumatica,
NULL AS DivisionFinancialReporting,
NULL AS Regions,

GETDATE()  AS RecordCreatedDate,
GETDATE()  AS RecordUpdatedDate
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
	TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION	AS LocationName,
	'TIMECARD' AS LocationType
	FROM  [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD] 
	WHERE TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION IS NOT NULL
	
	UNION 
	
	SELECT 
	TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS	AS LocationName,
	'FHIA_BJS' AS LocationType
	FROM  [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD] 
	WHERE TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS IS NOT NULL
	
	UNION 
	
	SELECT 
	TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION	AS LocationName,
	'GO_SOUTHERN' AS LocationType
	FROM  [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD] 
	WHERE TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION IS NOT NULL
	
	UNION
	
	SELECT 
	TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION	AS LocationName,
	'MADCITY' AS LocationType
	FROM  [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD] 
	WHERE TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION IS NOT NULL
	
	UNION 
	
	SELECT 
	TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION	AS LocationName,
	'MAXHOME' AS LocationType
	FROM  [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD] 
	WHERE TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION IS NOT NULL
	
	) M1

LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION ME 
	ON M1.LocationName = ME.LocationName
	AND ME.DataSource = 'Employee Timecard File'
	WHERE ME.LocationName IS NULL ;

SELECT  
COALESCE((SELECT MAX(SubLocation_PK) FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_SUB_LOCATION),3000) + 
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY M1.SubLocation DESC) AS SubLocation_PK,
CASE 
	WHEN M1.Division = 'E.Home Smart'			THEN 'HSI'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'G.Pacific Bath'			THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'D.Paradise'				THEN 'PHI'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'C.Mad City'				THEN 'MAC'
	WHEN M1.Division = '0.Renuity'				THEN 'REN'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'G.Pacific Gutter'		THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'H.Rite Window'			THEN 'RTW'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'B.Statewide'			THEN 'SWR'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'I.Home Organization'	THEN 'CTA'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'A.FHIA'					THEN 'FHI'
	WHEN M1.Division = 'F.Max Home'				THEN 'MXH'
	END AS Division,
	M1.SubLocation AS SubLocation,
	M1.PayrollCompanyCode,
	M1.PayrollCompanyName,
	M1.ACUID,
	M1.ACUBranch,
	M1.Market,
	GETDATE() AS RecordCreatedDate,
	GETDATE() AS RecordUpdatedDate
FROM  
	(
		SELECT * FROM 
			(
				SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SubLocation ORDER BY ReportDate DESC) AS RW,* 
				FROM ODS.HR_EMPLOYEE_SUB_LOCATION
					) MX
				WHERE RW=1

			) M1 
			
LEFT JOIN [EDW].[DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_SUB_LOCATION] ME 
	ON M1.SubLocation = ME.SubLocation
	WHERE ME.SubLocation IS NULL ;

scripts.text:
UPDATE M1
SET M1.WorkEmail = A.Mail
FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE M1
JOIN EDW.DIM_AD_USERDETAILS A  ON M1.EmployeeID = A.ADP_ASSOCIATE_ID
LEFT JOIN 
	(
		SELECT adp_associate_id from 
			(
				SELECT adp_Associate_Id,COUNT(1) ct 
				FROM EDW.DIM_AD_USERDETAILS
				GROUP BY adp_Associate_Id
				HAVING COUNT(1)>1
				) M1
		) B
ON A.adp_associate_id = B.adp_associate_id
WHERE B.adp_Associate_Id IS NULL 
AND A.adp_Associate_Id IS NOT NULL 
AND (M1.WorkEmail IS NULL OR M1.WorkEmail='')
AND A.Mail NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT WorkEmail FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE)



-- UPdate Email = NULL where Duplicate EMail exist Sorted by Position Status

UPDATE A
SET A.WorkEmail=''
FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE A 
JOIN 
	(
		SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY WOrkEmail ORDER BY PositionStatus) AS RW,
		WOrkEmail as WE,* FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE
		WHERE WOrkEmail IN 
		(
		SELECT WorkEmail FROM 
		(
		SELECT  WorkEmail,Count(DISTINCT EmployeeID) as ct FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE
		GROUP BY WorkEmail
		HAVING Count(DISTINCT EmployeeID)>1
		) M1
		) AND WorkEmail !=''
	) B

	ON A.EmployeeID = B.EmployeeID
	AND A.WOrkEmail = B.WOrkEmail

WHERE B.RW > 1;


-----------------------------


--************ UPDATE CURRENT RECORD FLAG *************


UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET CurrentRecordFlag = 'N';


WITH M1 AS 
(
SELECT * FROM 
(
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EmployeeID ORDER BY PositionStatus,COALESCE(TerminationDate,'2099-01-01') DESC,StateTaxCode,EEOC_JobClassification) AS RW,
* FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE
) A
WHERE RW=1
)


UPDATE AX 
SET AX.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'
FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE AX 
JOIN M1
ON AX.Employee_PK = M1.Employee_PK;


--********************************
-- UPDATE Employee Termination Date

UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE 
SET TerminationDate = NULL
WHERE TerminationDate ='2099-01-01';

UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET EmployeeID_LP_REF=NULL;


--Manual
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET EmployeeID_LP_Ref='MAC-3302' WHERE EmployeeID='EWGSLIJSN';

UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET EmployeeID_LP_REF='SWR-3544' WHERE EmployeeID='WQSQR6QOK';
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET EmployeeID_LP_REF='SWR-7503' WHERE EmployeeID='ALTP0OY5K';
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET EmployeeID_LP_REF='SWR-4917' WHERE EmployeeID='7455D3Y5N';
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET EmployeeID_LP_REF='SWR-4768' WHERE EmployeeID='UJXB9VU82';



-- ***** First Update based on Division and Email *******
UPDATE E1 
SET E1.EmployeeID_LP_REF = M3.EmployeeID
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE E1
JOIN

(

SELECT * FROM 

	(
			SELECT 
			Email,
			Division,
			EmployeeID,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Email,Division ORDER BY LP_EmployeeID DESC) AS RW
			FROM 
			(
				
				SELECT 
				Email,
				Division,
				EmployeeID,
				LP_EmployeeID
				FROM
				(
				
					SELECT 
						Email,
						Division,
						EmployeeID,
						Active,
						LP_EmployeeID,
						MAX(CAST(Active AS INT)) OVER (PARTITION BY Email) AS Active_Check
					FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE 
					WHERE Email IS NOT NULL
					AND Email NOT LIKE '%inactive%'
					AND Email NOT LIKE '%test%'
					
					) M 
				--WHERE Active = Active_Check
				
				) M1
			
			) M2
		
	WHERE RW=1
	) M3

ON E1.WorkEmail = M3.Email
AND E1.Division = M3.Division;





--***************** UPDATE PBC LP_EmployeeID after Migration Activity *******************


SELECT *
INTO #T_PBC_EMAIL
FROM 
(
		SELECT A.*,B.*,
		ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EmployeeID_1 ORDER BY Active DESC,LP_EmployeeID DESC) AS RW
		
		FROM
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT EMAIL,LEFT(Email, CHARINDEX('@', Email) - 1) AS Email_1 ,
			EmployeeID,
			LP_EmployeeID,
			Active
			FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE 
			WHERE DIVISION='PBC' 
			)A
		JOIN
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT WorkEmail,LEFT(WorkEmail, CHARINDEX('@', WorkEmail) - 1) AS Email_12 ,
			EmployeeID AS EmployeeID_1
			FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE 
			WHERE DIVISION='PBC' 
			AND WorkEmail IS NOT NULL 
			AND WorkEmail!=''
		) B
		ON A.Email_1 = B.Email_12
) M1
WHERE RW=1;



UPDATE E1 
SET E1.EmployeeID_LP_REF = M3.EmployeeID
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE E1
JOIN #T_PBC_EMAIL M3
ON E1.EmployeeID = M3.EmployeeID_1;



--************************************Update based on exact FN, like LN


UPDATE MX 
SET MX.EmployeeID_LP_REF = M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE MX
JOIN

(
	SELECT E.EmployeeID , E1.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID_To_UPD FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE  E
	JOIN 
		(
		SELECT * FROM 
					(
					SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName))),Division  ORDER BY Active DESC,Email DESC) AS RW, 
					Firstname,LastName,CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName)))as Fullname, EmployeeId, Division, Email, Zip, Active
					FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
					--WHERE Active=1
					) EX
			WHERE RW=1
			
			) E1
	ON 		E.Division = E1.Division
	AND  	E.Firstname = E1.Firstname 
	AND 	(E.Lastname LIKE '%' + E1.Lastname + '%')
	WHERE 	E.EmployeeID_LP_REF IS NULL
	
	) M1

ON MX.EmployeeID = M1.EmployeeID

WHERE M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD IS NOT NULL;



--*************************************Update based on exact LN, like FN



UPDATE MX 
SET MX.EmployeeID_LP_REF = M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE MX
JOIN

(
	SELECT E.EmployeeID , E1.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID_To_UPD FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE  E
	JOIN 
		(
		SELECT * FROM 
					(
					SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName))),Division  ORDER BY Active DESC,Email DESC) AS RW, 
					Firstname,LastName,CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName)))as Fullname, EmployeeId, Division, Email, Zip, Active
					FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
					--WHERE Active=1
					) EX
			WHERE RW=1
			
			) E1
	ON 		E.Division = E1.Division
	AND  	E.Lastname = E1.Lastname 
	AND 	(E.Firstname LIKE '%' + E1.Firstname + '%')
	WHERE 	E.EmployeeID_LP_REF IS NULL
	
	) M1

ON MX.EmployeeID = M1.EmployeeID

WHERE M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD IS NOT NULL;




--****************************** By Active Directory Name match




UPDATE MX 
SET MX.EmployeeID_LP_REF = M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE MX
JOIN

	(

		SELECT 
		E1.EmployeeID,
		E2.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID_To_UPD
		FROM 
		
		(
			SELECT 
				E.Division,
				E.EmployeeID,
				E.FirstName,
				E.LastName,
				CHARINDEX(' ', UD.FullName) AS SpacePosition,
				CASE 
					WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', UD.FullName) > 0 
					THEN SUBSTRING(UD.FullName, 1, CHARINDEX(' ', UD.FullName) - 1)
					ELSE UD.FullName 
				END AS UD_FirstName,
				CASE 
					WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', UD.FullName) > 0 
					THEN SUBSTRING(UD.FullName, CHARINDEX(' ', UD.FullName) + 1, LEN(UD.FullName))
					ELSE ''
				END AS UD_LastName
			FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE E
			JOIN EDW.DIM_AD_UserDetails UD ON E.EmployeeID = UD.adp_Associate_Id
			WHERE E.EmployeeID_LP_REF IS NULL
			
			) E1
			
			JOIN 
				(
				SELECT * FROM 
							(
							SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName))),Division  ORDER BY Active DESC,Email DESC) AS RW, 
							Firstname,LastName,CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName)))as Fullname, EmployeeId, Division, Email, Zip, Active
							FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
							--WHERE Active=1
							) EX
					WHERE RW=1
					
					) E2
			
			ON 		E1.Division = E2.Division
			AND  	E1.UD_LastName = E2.LastName
			AND 	(E1.UD_FirstName LIKE '%' + E2.FirstName + '%')
			
			
			)  M1 

ON MX.EmployeeID = M1.EmployeeID

WHERE M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD IS NOT NULL;


--************************ By Active Directory Name match






UPDATE MX 
SET MX.EmployeeID_LP_REF = M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE MX
JOIN

	(

		SELECT 
		E1.EmployeeID,
		E2.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID_To_UPD
		FROM 
		
		(
			SELECT 
				E.Division,
				E.EmployeeID,
				E.FirstName,
				E.LastName,
				CHARINDEX(' ', UD.FullName) AS SpacePosition,
				CASE 
					WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', UD.FullName) > 0 
					THEN SUBSTRING(UD.FullName, 1, CHARINDEX(' ', UD.FullName) - 1)
					ELSE UD.FullName 
				END AS UD_FirstName,
				CASE 
					WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', UD.FullName) > 0 
					THEN SUBSTRING(UD.FullName, CHARINDEX(' ', UD.FullName) + 1, LEN(UD.FullName))
					ELSE ''
				END AS UD_LastName
			FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE E
			JOIN EDW.DIM_AD_UserDetails UD ON E.EmployeeID = UD.adp_Associate_Id
			WHERE E.EmployeeID_LP_REF IS NULL
			
			) E1
			
			JOIN 
				(
				SELECT * FROM 
							(
							SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName))),Division  ORDER BY Active DESC,Email DESC) AS RW, 
							Firstname,LastName,CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName)))as Fullname, EmployeeId, Division, Email, Zip, Active
							FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
							--WHERE Active=1
							) EX
					WHERE RW=1
					
					) E2
			
			ON 		E1.Division = E2.Division
			AND  	E1.UD_FirstName = E2.FirstName
			AND 	(E1.UD_LastName LIKE '%' + E2.LastName + '%')
			
			
			)  M1 

ON MX.EmployeeID = M1.EmployeeID

WHERE M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD IS NOT NULL;


--************************ By address and firstname


With ADP as 
	(Select Division,EmployeeId, FirstName, Lastname, WorkEmail, AddressLine1, City, County, Zip, Homephone ,TerritoryCode, PositionStatus , CurrentRecordFlag 
	 from EDW.DIM_HR_employee where EmployeeID_LP_Ref is null 
	), 
Final as (
	Select A.*, E.EmployeeId as LPID
	--Select A.*, E.EmployeeId, E.Address, E.city, E.state, E.Zip, E.Homephone, E.CellPhone, E.Firstname, E.lastname, E.Email
	from ADP A left join EDW.DIM_employee E on A.Division=E.Division and A.AddressLine1=E.Address and A.Zip=E.Zip and A.Firstname like '%' + E.Firstname + '%'
	where E.Division is not null 
	) 
--Select T1.EmployeeId, T2.* 
Update T1 Set EmployeeId_LP_Ref =T2.LPID
from EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T1 join Final T2 on T1.EmployeeId=T2.EmployeeId and T1.CurrentRecordFlag=T2.CurrentRecordFlag;
--Order by T1.EmployeeId




--************************ By address and last name

With ADP as 
	( Select Division,EmployeeId, FirstName, Lastname, WorkEmail, AddressLine1, City,County, Zip, Homephone ,TerritoryCode, PositionStatus , CurrentRecordFlag from EDW.DIM_HR_employee where EmployeeID_LP_Ref is null --and EmployeeId='00RND908M'
	),
Final as (
	Select A.*, E.EmployeeId as LPID
	--E.EmployeeId, E.Address, E.city, E.state, E.Zip,  E.Homephone, E.CellPhone,E.Firstname, E.lastname, E.Email
	from ADP A left join EDW.DIM_employee E on A.Division=E.Division and A.AddressLine1=E.Address and A.Zip=E.Zip and A.Lastname like '%' + E.Lastname + '%' 
										 and Replace(Replace(Replace(Replace(Replace(A.Homephone,'+1',''),'(',''),')',''),'-',''),' ','')= Replace(Replace(Replace(Replace(Replace(E.CellPhone,'+1',''),'(',''),')',''),'-',''),' ','')
	where E.Division is not null 
	)
Update T1 Set EmployeeId_LP_Ref =T2.LPID
from EDW.DIM_HR_Employee T1 join Final T2 on T1.EmployeeId=T2.EmployeeId and T1.CurrentRecordFlag=T2.CurrentRecordFlag;
--Order by A.EmployeeId


--********************** like FN, LN and address

UPDATE MX 
SET MX.EmployeeID_LP_REF = M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE MX
JOIN

(
	SELECT E.EmployeeID ,  E1.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID_To_UPD
	--SELECT E.EmployeeID , E.FirstName, E.LastName,E.AddressLine1, E1.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID_To_UPD	,E1.FirstName, E1.LastName, E1.Address
	FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE  E
	 JOIN 
		(
		SELECT * FROM 
					(
					SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName))),Division  ORDER BY Active DESC,Email DESC) AS RW, 
					Firstname,LastName,CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName)))as Fullname, EmployeeId, Division, Email, Zip, Active, Address
					FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
					--WHERE Active=1
					) EX
			WHERE RW=1
			
			) E1
	ON 		E.Division = E1.Division
	AND  	(E.Firstname LIKE '%' + E1.Firstname + '%') 
	AND 	(E.Lastname LIKE '%' + E1.Lastname + '%')
	and   Left(Replace(E.AddressLine1,' ',''),3)= Left(Replace(E1.Address,' ',''), 3)
	WHERE 	E.EmployeeID_LP_REF IS NULL
	
	) M1

ON MX.EmployeeID = M1.EmployeeID

WHERE M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD IS NOT NULL;


-- ***** Second Update based on Email for pending ones without Division match *******


UPDATE E1 
SET E1.EmployeeID_LP_REF = M3.EmployeeID
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE E1
JOIN

(

SELECT * FROM 

	(
			SELECT 
			Email,
			Division,
			EmployeeID,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Email,Division ORDER BY LP_EmployeeID DESC) AS RW
			FROM 
			(
				
				SELECT 
				Email,
				Division,
				EmployeeID,
				LP_EmployeeID
				FROM
				(
				
					SELECT 
						Email,
						Division,
						EmployeeID,
						Active,
						LP_EmployeeID,
						MAX(CAST(Active AS INT)) OVER (PARTITION BY Email) AS Active_Check
					FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE 
					WHERE Email IS NOT NULL
					AND Email NOT LIKE '%inactive%'
					AND Email NOT LIKE '%test%'
					
					) M 
				--WHERE Active = Active_Check
				
				) M1
			
			) M2
		
	WHERE RW=1
	) M3

ON E1.WorkEmail = M3.Email

WHERE E1.EmployeeID_LP_REF IS NULL;

-- Priority 2 From Email

UPDATE A 
SET A.Division = B.Div_NEW
FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE A 
JOIN
(
SELECT EmployeeID,
CASE 
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%closetamerica%'		THEN 'CTA'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%madcitywindows%'		THEN 'MAC'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%homesmartind%'			THEN 'HSI'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%paradisehomeimprove%' 	THEN 'PHI'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%paradisehomepro%'		THEN 'PHI'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%ritewindow%'			THEN 'RTW'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%pacificbath%'			THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%renuityhome%'			THEN 'REN'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%fhiaremodeling%'		THEN 'FHI'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%maxhomenow%'			THEN 'FHI'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%statewideremodeling%' 	THEN 'SWR'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%homeforeverbaths%'		THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN WorkEMail_Domain LIKE '%titanhomeimprovement%'	THEN 'REN'
	END AS Div_NEW
FROM
(
	SELECT 
    EmployeeID,
	CASE 
	WHEN WorkEMail IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(WorkEMail)) = '' THEN NULL
	WHEN CHARINDEX('@', WorkEMail) > 0 AND CHARINDEX('.', WorkEMail, CHARINDEX('@', WorkEMail)) > 0 THEN
    LEFT(
      SUBSTRING(WorkEMail, CHARINDEX('@', WorkEMail) + 1, LEN(WorkEMail)),
      CHARINDEX('.', SUBSTRING(WorkEMail, CHARINDEX('@', WorkEMail) + 1, LEN(WorkEMail))) - 1
    )
	ELSE NULL
	END AS WorkEMail_Domain,
	 
	 DIvision
	FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE
) M1

) B 

ON A.EmployeeID = B.EmployeeID
WHERE Div_NEW IS NOT NULL
AND A.Division IS NULL;


--Priority3 From Location
UPDATE A 
SET A.Division = B.Division
FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE A 
JOIN [EDW].[DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION] B 
ON A.Location_PK = B.Location_PK
WHERE B.Division IS NOT NULL
AND A.Division IS NULL;



--************************************** OVERRIDE ALL DIVISION by GIVING Highest Priority to BusinessUnitDescription ***********************************

UPDATE A
SET A.Division = B.Division
FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE A
JOIN
(
	SELECT DISTINCT EmployeeID,BusinessUnitDescription,
	CASE 
		WHEN BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%FHIA%'				OR BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%Florida%'		THEN 'FHI'
		WHEN BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%Closet America%'	OR BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%HomeBase%'	THEN 'CTA'
		WHEN BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%HomeSmart%'															THEN 'RTW'
		WHEN BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%Mad City%'															THEN 'MAC'
		WHEN BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%Max Home%'	OR BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%East Division%'		THEN 'FHI'
		WHEN BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%Rite Window%'														THEN 'RTW'
		WHEN BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%Statewide Remodeling%'												THEN 'SWR'
		WHEN BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%West Division%'														THEN 'PBC'
		WHEN BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%Charlotte%'			OR BusinessUnitDescription LIKE '%Remote%'		THEN 'REN'
		ELSE 'NA' END AS Division
	FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE
	) B
ON A.EmployeeID = B.EmployeeID
AND A.BusinessUnitDescription = B.BusinessUnitDescription
WHERE B.Division !='NA';




UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET Division='CTA' WHERE Division='PHI';
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET Division='RTW' WHERE Division='HSI';
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET Division='FHI' WHERE Division='MXH';

INSERT INTO EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION 
(Location_PK,
Division,
DataSource,
LocationType,
LocationName,
RecordCreatedDate,
RecordUpdatedDate)

--*
SELECT 
RW + ( SELECT MAX(Location_PK) FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION ) AS Location_PK,
--Division,
CASE 
				WHEN Division IN ('FHIA','Renuity - Florida')					THEN 'FHI'
				WHEN Division IN ('Closet America','Paradise Home Improvement','Renuity Home Base')	THEN 'CTA'
				WHEN Division='MaxHome'											THEN 'MXH'
				WHEN Division='Statewide Remodeling'							THEN 'SWR'
				WHEN Division IN ('Rite Window','Home Smart')					THEN 'RTW'
				WHEN Division='Pacific Bath' OR Division LIKE '%WEST%'			THEN 'PBC'
				WHEN Division='Mad City'										THEN 'MAC'
				WHEN Division IN ('Renuity-Remote','Renuity-Charlotte',	'Renuity Call Center')	THEN 'REN'
				ELSE NULL END AS Division_Mod,
'Employee HeadCount Data' AS Division,

'NA' AS LocationType,
LocationDescription AS LocationName,
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS RecordCreatedDate,
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AS RecordUpdatedDate
FROM
(
	SELECT 
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY LocationDescription)  AS RW,
	Division,
	LocationDescription
	FROM 
	(
	SELECT DISTINCT A.Division,A.LocationDescription FROM [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_HEADCOUNT]  A 
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION B 
	ON A.LocationDescription = B.LocationName
	WHERE B.LocationName IS NULL
	AND A.LocationDescription IS NOT NULL AND A.LocationDescription !=''
	) M1
) M2;

-- Step 1: Create a temp table to store unmatched EmployeeIDs

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#UnmatchedEmployees') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #UnmatchedEmployees;

SELECT EmployeeID
INTO #UnmatchedEmployees
FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE Data_Identifier='HEADCOUNT'

EXCEPT

SELECT AssociateID
FROM ODS.ADP_EMPLOYEE_HEADCOUNT;

-- Step 2: Check count and delete if < 20
IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM #UnmatchedEmployees) < 20
BEGIN
    DELETE A
    FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE A
    JOIN #UnmatchedEmployees B
      ON A.EmployeeID = B.EmployeeID;
END



--****************************************

-- Delete Employees from Timecard Employee to process from Headcount file

SELECT 
EmployeeID
INTO #UnmatchedEmployees_TIMECARD
FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE A 
JOIN  ODS.ADP_EMPLOYEE_HEADCOUNT B 
ON A.EmployeeID = B.AssociateID
WHERE Data_Identifier='TIMECARD';



DELETE A
    FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE A
    JOIN #UnmatchedEmployees_TIMECARD B
      ON A.EmployeeID = B.EmployeeID;



-- *****************************************


UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE 
SET TerminationDate = '2099-01-01'
WHERE TerminationDate IS NULL OR TerminationDate='';


UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE 
Set CurrentRecordFlag='N';

SELECT * INTO #T_SRC FROM 
	(
	SELECT DISTINCT
	AssociateID
	,PositionStatus
    ,CASE WHEN TerminationDate IS NULL OR TerminationDate='' THEN NULL ELSE CONVERT(varchar(10), TRY_CONVERT(date, TerminationDate, 101), 23) END AS TerminationDate
	,LocationDesc
	,SubLocation
	,Recruiter
	,Race_Desc
	,WorkerCategoryDesc
	,City
	,State
	,PositionID
	,CONVERT(varchar(10), TRY_CONVERT(date,Hire_Rehire_Date, 101), 23) AS Hire_Rehire_Date
	,CONVERT(varchar(10), TRY_CONVERT(date, BirthDate, 101), 23) AS BirthDate

	,CONVERT(varchar(10), TRY_CONVERT(date,RehireDate, 101), 23) AS RehireDate
	,EmployeeEligibleForRehire  			
	,Rehire_EligibilityComments  
	,Rehire_ReasonDescription	
	,PersonalEmail
	,WorkEmail
	,YearsOfService

	,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY AssociateID,PositionStatus,COALESCE(TerminationDate,'2099-01-01') ORDER BY WorkerCategoryDesc DESC) AS RW
	FROM ODS.ADP_EMPLOYEE_WBR
		) MX
	WHERE RW=1;
	


--*****************************



UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.LocationDesc        =  CASE WHEN TGT.LocationDesc IS NULL OR TGT.LocationDesc='' THEN SRC.LocationDesc ELSE TGT.LocationDesc END        ,
TGT.SubLocation         =  CASE WHEN TGT.SubLocation  IS NULL OR TGT.SubLocation ='' THEN SRC.SubLocation  ELSE TGT.SubLocation  END        ,
TGT.Recruiter           =  SRC.Recruiter             ,
TGT.Race                =  SRC.Race_Desc             ,
TGT.WorkerCategoryDesc  =  SRC.WorkerCategoryDesc    ,
TGT.City                =  SRC.City                  ,
TGT.State               =  SRC.State                 ,
TGT.PositionID          =  SRC.PositionID            ,
TGT.Hire_Rehire_Date    =  SRC.Hire_Rehire_Date      ,
TGT.BirthDate           =  SRC.BirthDate			,	 
TGT.RehireDate			=  SRC.RehireDate			 ,
TGT.EmployeeEligibleForRehire  =  SRC.EmployeeEligibleForRehire,
TGT.Rehire_EligibilityComments =  SRC.Rehire_EligibilityComments,
TGT.Rehire_ReasonDescription  =   SRC.Rehire_ReasonDescription,
TGT.PersonalEmail              =  SRC.PersonalEmail
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE TGT
JOIN #T_SRC  SRC
ON TGT.EmployeeID      = SRC.AssociateID
AND TGT.PositionStatus  = SRC.PositionStatus
AND COALESCE(TGT.TerminationDate,'2099-01-01') = COALESCE(SRC.TerminationDate,'2099-01-01');



--*****************************



UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.BirthDate           =  SRC.BirthDate
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE TGT
JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AssociateID,BirthDate FROM #T_SRC ) SRC
ON TGT.EmployeeID      = SRC.AssociateID
WHERE TGT.BirthDate ='1900-01-01';


--*****************************


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.Hire_Rehire_Date    =  SRC.Hire_Rehire_Date      
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE TGT
JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AssociateID,Hire_Rehire_Date FROM #T_SRC ) SRC
ON TGT.EmployeeID      = SRC.AssociateID
WHERE TGT.Hire_Rehire_Date ='1900-01-01';



--*******************************


UPDATE TGT
SET 
TGT.WorkEmail    =  SRC.WorkEmail      
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE TGT
JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT AssociateID,WorkEmail FROM #T_SRC ) SRC
ON TGT.EmployeeID      = SRC.AssociateID
WHERE TGT.WorkEmail IS NULL


--*************************


UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET RehireDate='1900-01-01' 			WHERE RehireDate IS NULL;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET EmployeeEligibleForRehire='' 	WHERE EmployeeEligibleForRehire IS NULL;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET Rehire_EligibilityComments='' 	WHERE Rehire_EligibilityComments IS NULL;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET Rehire_ReasonDescription='' 		WHERE Rehire_ReasonDescription IS NULL;
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET PersonalEmail='' 				WHERE PersonalEmail IS NULL;

-- Override Division from Timecard

UPDATE M2 
SET M2.Division = M1.Division
FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE M2
JOIN
(
	SELECT EmployeeID,Division FROM
	(
	SELECT EmployeeID,Division,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EmployeeID ORDER BY PayDate DESC) AS RW
	FROM EDW.FACT_HR_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD
	WHERE Division IS NOT NULL 
	AND Division NOT IN ('NA','REN')
	) A
	WHERE RW=1
	) M1

ON  M2.EmployeeID = M1.EmployeeID
WHERE M1.Division!=M2.Division;



--***************************************


UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE 
SET Division = CASE 
					WHEN PayrollCompanyName LIKE '%STATEWIDE%'												THEN 'SWR'
					WHEN PayrollCompanyName LIKE '%FHI%' OR PayrollCompanyName LIKE '%MAX HOME%'			THEN 'FHI'
					WHEN PayrollCompanyName LIKE '%Rite Window%'											THEN 'RTW'
					WHEN PayrollCompanyName LIKE '%Rite Window%' OR PayrollCompanyName LIKE '%HOMESMART%'	THEN 'RTW'
					WHEN PayrollCompanyName LIKE '%Renuity Operation%'										THEN 'REN'
					ELSE Division END
					
WHERE Division IS NULL;


--***************************************

UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET Division='CTA' WHERE Division='PHI';
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET Division='RTW' WHERE Division='HSI';
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET Division='FHI' WHERE Division='MXH';

UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET Division='NA' WHERE Division IS NULL;

--#####################################################################
--#################### TEMP TABLES STARTS HERE  #######################
--#####################################################################

SELECT *,
	CASE WHEN TerminationDate IS NULL OR TerminationDate ='' THEN '2099-01-01' ELSE  FORMAT(CAST(TerminationDate AS DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd') END AS TerminationDate_ORD,	
	CASE 
		WHEN Division IN ('FHIA','Renuity - Florida')					THEN 'FHI'
		WHEN Division IN ('Closet America','Paradise Home Improvement','Renuity Home Base')	THEN 'CTA'
		WHEN Division='MaxHome'											THEN 'MXH'
		WHEN Division='Statewide Remodeling'							THEN 'SWR'
		WHEN Division IN ('Rite Window','Home Smart')					THEN 'RTW'
		WHEN Division='Pacific Bath' OR Division LIKE '%WEST%'			THEN 'PBC'
		WHEN Division='Mad City'										THEN 'MAC'
		WHEN Division IN ('Renuity-Remote','Renuity-Charlotte',	'Renuity Call Center')	THEN 'REN'
		ELSE NULL END  AS Division_Mod
	INTO #T_EMPLOYEE_HEADCOUNT_1
	FROM ODS.ADP_EMPLOYEE_HEADCOUNT
	
	--***********************
	
	
	SELECT * 
	INTO #T_TIMECARD_1
		FROM 
		(
			SELECT  
			ASSOCIATE_ID,
			WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ASSOCIATE_ID ORDER BY InsertedDate DESC) AS RW_1
			FROM [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD]
			WHERE WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL IS NOT NULL
		) M1 
		WHERE RW_1=1 
		
	--**********************
	
	
		SELECT * 
		INTO #T_TIMECARD_2
		FROM 
		(
			SELECT  
			ASSOCIATE_ID,
			PAY_CLASS,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ASSOCIATE_ID ORDER BY InsertedDate DESC) AS RW_1
			FROM [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD]
			WHERE PAY_CLASS IS NOT NULL
		) M1 
		WHERE RW_1=1 
		
		
	--**********************
		
		SELECT * 
		INTO #T_TIMECARD_3
		FROM 
		(
			SELECT  
			ASSOCIATE_ID,
			PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ASSOCIATE_ID ORDER BY InsertedDate DESC) AS RW_1
			FROM [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD]
			WHERE PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP IS NOT NULL
		) M1 
		WHERE RW_1=1 
		
		
	--************************
	
	
	SELECT * 
	INTO #T_TIMECARD_4
		FROM 
		(
			SELECT  
			ASSOCIATE_ID,
			Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ASSOCIATE_ID ORDER BY InsertedDate DESC) AS RW_1
			FROM [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD]
			WHERE Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description IS NOT NULL
		) M1 
		WHERE RW_1=1 ;
		
		
	--**************************
	
	SELECT DISTINCT ReportsToAssociateID,ReportsToEmail 
	INTO #T_EMPLOYEE_HEADCOUNT_2
		FROM ODS.ADP_EMPLOYEE_HEADCOUNT 
		WHERE ReportsToEmail IS NOT NULL;


--#####################################################################
--#################### TEMP TABLES END HERE  ##########################
--#####################################################################





SELECT DISTINCT
COALESCE((SELECT MAX(Employee_PK) FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE),2000) + 
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.AssociateID DESC) AS Employee_PK,
B.Location_PK,
C.SubLocation_PK,
A.AssociateID AS EmployeeID,
A.ReportsToAssociateID AS ManagerID,
A.Division_Mod AS Division, --B.Division)  -- Pririty 1 From Headcount File
LTRIM(RIGHT(A.PayrollName, LEN(A.PayrollName) - CHARINDEX(',', A.PayrollName))) AS FirstName,
LEFT(A.PayrollName, CHARINDEX(',', A.PayrollName) - 1) AS LastName,  
A.JobTitleDescription,
A.FLSADescription,

COALESCE(A.WorkEmail,RE.ReportsToEmail,TC_1.WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL) 					AS WorkEmail,
TC_2.PAY_CLASS 								AS PayClass,
TC_3.PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP 	AS PayClassTimeclock_RestrictionGroup,
TC_4.Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description 	AS BenifitsEligibility_ClassDescription,

A.HomeDepartmentDescription,
FORMAT(CAST(A.HireDate AS DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS HireDate,
A.TerminationDate_ORD AS TerminationDate,
A.TerminationReasonDescription,
A.PositionStatus,
A.PayrollCompanyName,
A.SubDepartment,
--A.BirthDate,
A.GenderforInsuranceCoverage AS Gender,
A.PayrollCompanyCode,
--CAST(NULL AS VARBINARY(4000))AS Emp_HashKEy,
A.IsManagementPosition,
A.BusinessUnitDescription,
--A.PositionStartDate,
A.PositionEffectiveDate,
A.NewHireIndicatior,
A.YearsOfService,
A.Level,
A.FileNumber,
A.StateTaxDescription,
CASE WHEN A.StateTaxCode IS NULL OR A.StateTaxCode='' THEN 'NA' ELSE A.StateTaxCode END AS StateTaxCode,
A.SUI_SDI_TaxCode,
A.JobClassCode,
A.JobClassDescription,
CASE WHEN A.EEOC_JobClassification IS NULL OR A.EEOC_JobClassification='' THEN 'NA' ELSE A.EEOC_JobClassification END AS EEOC_JobClassification,
A.NAICSWorkersCompCode,--New column added
CASE WHEN A.LocationDescription IS NOT NULL OR A.LocationDescription!='' 	THEN A.LocationDescription 	ELSE NULL END AS LocationDesc,
CASE WHEN A.SubLocation 		IS NOT NULL OR A.SubLocation!='' 			THEN A.SubLocation 			ELSE NULL END AS SubLocation,
'N' AS CurrentRecordFlag	,
GETDATE() AS RecordCreatedDate,
GETDATE() AS RecordUpdatedDate,

CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(100)) AS EmployeeID_LP_REF,
'HEADCOUNT' AS Data_Identifier	,
CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(100)) AS  Recruiter                ,
CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(100)) AS  Race                     ,
CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(100)) AS  WorkerCategoryDesc       ,
A.City 						AS  City                     ,
A.State 					AS  State                    ,
CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(100)) AS  PositionID               ,
CAST('1900-01-01' AS DATE) AS Hire_Rehire_Date			 ,
CAST('1900-01-01' AS DATE) AS BirthDate					 ,
A.HomePhone,


A.AddressLine1       ,
A.AddressLine2       ,
A.AddressLine3       ,
A.County             ,
A.TerritoryCode      ,
A.Zip				 ,
A.LocationCode 			--added on 5/11

INTO #T_SRC

FROM 
#T_EMPLOYEE_HEADCOUNT_1 A 
LEFT JOIN [EDW].[DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION] B 
ON A.LocationDescription = B.LocationName
AND COALESCE(A.Division_Mod,'NA') = COALESCE(B.Division,'NA')
LEFT JOIN [EDW].[DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_SUB_LOCATION] C
ON A.Sublocation = C.SubLocation
AND COALESCE(A.Division_Mod,'NA') = COALESCE(C.Division,'NA')


--WORK EMAIL

LEFT JOIN #T_TIMECARD_1 TC_1 
		ON A.AssociateID =  TC_1.ASSOCIATE_ID

--PAY_CLASS

LEFT JOIN #T_TIMECARD_2 TC_2
		ON A.AssociateID =  TC_2.ASSOCIATE_ID

--PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP

LEFT JOIN #T_TIMECARD_3 TC_3
		ON A.AssociateID =  TC_3.ASSOCIATE_ID


--BENEFITS_ELIGIBILITY_CLASS_DESCRIPTION
		
LEFT JOIN #T_TIMECARD_4 TC_4 
		ON A.AssociateID =  TC_4.ASSOCIATE_ID


LEFT JOIN #T_EMPLOYEE_HEADCOUNT_2 RE 
	
	ON A.AssociateID = RE.ReportsToAssociateID
	
--WHERE A.AssociateID='CZM50EOQP'





--#########################################################
--##################### SRC is Genereated #################
--#########################################################

IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ODS.ADP_EMPLOYEE_HEADCOUNT) > 10000

BEGIN

    TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE;

END


--############ INSERT QUERY #################


INSERT INTO EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE

(Employee_PK	,
Location_PK	,
SubLocation_PK	,
EmployeeID	,
ManagerID	,
Division	,
FirstName	,
LastName	,
JobTitleDescription	,
FLSADescription	,
WorkEmail	,
PayClass	,
PayClassTimeclock_RestrictionGroup	,
BenifitsEligibility_ClassDescription	,
HomeDepartmentDescription	,
HireDate	,
TerminationDate	,
TerminationReasonDescription	,
PositionStatus	,
PayrollCompanyName	,
SubDepartment	,
Gender	,
PayrollCompanyCode	,
IsManagementPosition	,
BusinessUnitDescription	,
PositionEffectiveDate	,
NewHireIndicatior	,
YearsOfService	,
Level	,
FileNumber	,
StateTaxDescription	,
StateTaxCode	,
SUI_SDI_TaxCode	,
JobClassCode	,
JobClassDescription	,
EEOC_JobClassification	,
EmployeeID_LP_REF	,
CurrentRecordFlag	,
RecordCreatedDate	,
RecordUpdatedDate	,
Data_Identifier	,
NAICSWorkersCompCode	,
Recruiter	,
Race	,
WorkerCategoryDesc	,
City	,
State	,
PositionID	,
Hire_Rehire_Date	,
BirthDate	,
LocationDesc	,
SubLocation	,
HomePhone,
AddressLine1    ,
AddressLine2    ,
AddressLine3    ,
County          ,
TerritoryCode   ,
Zip				,
LocationCode

)

SELECT 
A.Employee_PK	,
A.Location_PK	,
A.SubLocation_PK	,
A.EmployeeID	,
A.ManagerID	,
A.Division	,
A.FirstName	,
A.LastName	,
A.JobTitleDescription	,
A.FLSADescription	,
A.WorkEmail	,
A.PayClass	,
A.PayClassTimeclock_RestrictionGroup	,
A.BenifitsEligibility_ClassDescription	,
A.HomeDepartmentDescription	,
A.HireDate	,
A.TerminationDate	,
A.TerminationReasonDescription	,
A.PositionStatus	,
A.PayrollCompanyName	,
A.SubDepartment	,
A.Gender	,
A.PayrollCompanyCode	,
A.IsManagementPosition	,
A.BusinessUnitDescription	,
A.PositionEffectiveDate	,
A.NewHireIndicatior	,
A.YearsOfService	,
A.Level	,
A.FileNumber	,
A.StateTaxDescription	,
A.StateTaxCode	,
A.SUI_SDI_TaxCode	,
A.JobClassCode	,
A.JobClassDescription	,
A.EEOC_JobClassification	,
A.EmployeeID_LP_REF	,
A.CurrentRecordFlag	,
A.RecordCreatedDate	,
A.RecordUpdatedDate	,
A.Data_Identifier	,
A.NAICSWorkersCompCode	,
A.Recruiter                ,
A.Race                     ,
A.WorkerCategoryDesc       ,
A.City                     ,
A.State                    ,
A.PositionID               ,
A.Hire_Rehire_Date			 ,
A.BirthDate					 ,
A.LocationDesc				,
A.SubLocation				,
A.HomePhone					,

A.AddressLine1              ,
A.AddressLine2              ,
A.AddressLine3              ,
A.County                    ,
A.TerritoryCode             ,
A.Zip						,
A.LocationCode

FROM #T_SRC A
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE B
ON  A.EmployeeID 				= B.EmployeeID
AND A.PositionStatus 			= B.PositionStatus
AND A.TerminationDate 			= B.TerminationDate
AND A.StateTaxCode 				= B.StateTaxCode
AND A.EEOC_JobClassification 	= B.EEOC_JobClassification
AND A.Data_Identifier 			= B.Data_Identifier
AND A.PayrollCompanyName		= B.PayrollCompanyName
AND A.PayrollCompanyCode		= B.PayrollCompanyCode

WHERE B.EmployeeID IS NULL;

B.TerritoryCode								=   A.TerritoryCode              ,
B.Zip										=   A.Zip						 ,
B.LocationCode								=   A.LocationCode


FROM  #T_SRC A
JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE B
ON  A.EmployeeID 				= B.EmployeeID
AND A.PositionStatus 			= B.PositionStatus
AND A.TerminationDate 			= B.TerminationDate
AND A.StateTaxCode 				= B.StateTaxCode
AND A.EEOC_JobClassification 	= B.EEOC_JobClassification
AND A.Data_Identifier 			= B.Data_Identifier
AND A.PayrollCompanyName		= B.PayrollCompanyName
AND A.PayrollCompanyCode		= B.PayrollCompanyCode

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COALESCE((SELECT MAX(Employee_PK) FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE),2000) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY M4.EmployeeID) AS Employee_PK,
NULL AS Location_PK,
NULL AS SubLocation_PK,
M4.EmployeeID,
M4.ManagerID,

CASE 
	WHEN M4.Division = 'E.Home Smart'			THEN 'HSI'
	WHEN M4.Division = 'G.Pacific Bath'	OR M4.Division LIKE '%WEST%'		THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN M4.Division = 'D.Paradise'				THEN 'PHI'
	WHEN M4.Division = 'C.Mad City'				THEN 'MAC'
	WHEN M4.Division IN ( 'Renuity-Charlotte','Renuity-Remote')			THEN 'REN'
	WHEN M4.Division = 'G.Pacific Gutter'	OR M4.Division LIKE '%WEST%' THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN M4.Division = 'H.Rite Window'			THEN 'RTW'
	WHEN M4.Division = 'B.Statewide'			THEN 'SWR'
	WHEN M4.Division IN ('I.Home Organization','Renuity Home Base')	THEN 'CTA'
	WHEN M4.Division IN ('A.FHIA','Renuity - Florida')	THEN 'FHI'
	WHEN M4.Division = 'F.Max Home'				THEN 'MXH'
	END AS Division,

M4.FirstName,
M4.LastName,
M4.JobTitleDescription,
M4.FLSADescription,
M4.WorkEmail,
M4.PayClass,
M4.PayClassTimeclock_RestrictionGroup,
M4.BenifitsEligibility_ClassDescription,

NULL AS HomeDepartmentDescription	 ,
CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS HireDate					 ,
CAST(NULL AS DATE)  AS TerminationDate				 ,
NULL AS TerminationReasonDescription ,
NULL AS PositionStatus				 ,
NULL AS PayrollCompanyName			 ,
NULL AS SubDepartment				 ,
NULL AS Gender						 ,
NULL AS PayrollCompanyCode	         ,

NULL AS IsManagementPosition,
NULL AS BusinessUnitDescription,
NULL AS PositionStartDate,
CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS PositionEffectiveDate,
NULL AS NewHireIndicatior,
NULL AS YearsOfService,
NULL AS Level,
NULL AS FileNumber,

NULL AS StateTaxDescription,
NULL AS StateTaxCode,
NULL AS SUI_SDI_TaxCode,
NULL AS JobClassCode,
NULL AS JobClassDescription,
NULL AS EEOC_JobClassification,

NULL AS EmployeeEligibleForRehire,
CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RehireDate,
NULL AS Rehire_EligibilityComments,
NULL AS Rehire_ReasonDescription,
NULL AS PersonalEmail,
NULL AS HomePhone,

--M4.EMP_HashKey,
M4.RecordCreatedDate,
M4.RecordUpdatedDate,
'N' AS CurrentRecordFlag,

NULL AS AddressLine1       ,
NULL AS AddressLine2       ,
NULL AS AddressLine3       ,
NULL AS County             ,
NULL AS TerritoryCode      ,
NULL AS Zip					

FROM 
(

	SELECT * 
		FROM 
		(	
			SELECT 
				EmployeeID,
				ManagerID,
				Division,
				FirstName,
				LastName,
				JobTitleDescription,
				FLSADescription,
				WorkEmail,
				PayClass,
				PayClassTimeclock_RestrictionGroup,
				BenifitsEligibility_ClassDescription,
				--EMP_HashKey,
				MIN(TimeEntry_Formated) OVER (PARTITION BY EmployeeID) AS RecordCreatedDate,
				MAX(TimeEntry_Formated) OVER (PARTITION BY EmployeeID) AS RecordUpdatedDate,
				CurrentRecordFlag,
				RW,
				TimeEntry_Formated
				FROM 
				(
					
					SELECT 	
					ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EmployeeID ORDER BY TimeEntry DESC) AS RW,
						
					CAST(	
						CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), 
						DATEADD(SECOND, TimeEntry % 100, 
							DATEADD(MINUTE, (TimeEntry / 100) % 100, 
								DATEADD(HOUR, (TimeEntry / 10000) % 100, 
									DATEADD(DAY, (TimeEntry / 1000000) % 100 - 1, 
										DATEADD(YEAR, (TimeEntry / 10000000000) + 2000 - 1900, 0)  -- Corrected Year Calculation
									)
								)
							)
						), 120
					)  AS DATE) AS TimeEntry_Formated,
					
					*
					FROM 
					(	
						SELECT 
							DISTINCT	
							ASSOCIATE_ID								AS EmployeeID,
							Reports_to_AssociateID						AS ManagerID,
							Division									AS Division,
							FIRST_NAME									AS FirstName,
							LAST_NAME									AS LastName,
							JOB_TITLE_DESCRIPTION						AS JobTitleDescription,
							FLSA_DESCRIPTION							AS FLSADescription,
							WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL						AS WorkEmail,
							PAY_CLASS									AS PayClass,
							PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP		AS PayClassTimeclock_RestrictionGroup,
							Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description		AS BenifitsEligibility_ClassDescription,
							GETDATE()	AS	RecordCreatedDate,
							GETDATE()	AS	RecordUpdatedDate,
							'Y'			AS	CurrentRecordFlag,
							
							CAST(
										CONCAT(
											SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 5, 2),  -- Year (YY)
											SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 1, 2),  -- Month (MM)
											SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 3, 2),  -- Day (DD)
											SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 7, 2),  -- Hour (HH)
											SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 9, 2),  -- Minute (MM)
											SUBSTRING([ref_file], CHARINDEX('_', [ref_file]) + 11, 2)  -- Second (SS)
										) AS BIGINT
									) AS TimeEntry
							
							FROM [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD] 						
							
							) M1
						
						) M2
				
				) M3
				
		WHERE RW=1
		
		) M4
	
	LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE ME 
	ON M4.EmployeeID = ME.EmployeeID
	WHERE ME.EmployeeID IS NULL  -- Only Employees which didn't come in HeadCount File and are present here.

scripts.text:
UPDATE EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE SET EmployeeID_LP_REF=NULL;


-- ***** First Update based on Division and Email *******
UPDATE E1 
SET E1.EmployeeID_LP_REF = M3.EmployeeID
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE E1
JOIN

(

SELECT * FROM 

	(
			SELECT 
			Email,
			Division,
			EmployeeID,
			ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Email,Division ORDER BY LP_EmployeeID DESC) AS RW
			FROM 
			(
				
				SELECT 
				Email,
				Division,
				EmployeeID,
				LP_EmployeeID
				FROM
				(
				
					SELECT 
						Email,
						Division,
						EmployeeID,
						Active,
						LP_EmployeeID,
						MAX(CAST(Active AS INT)) OVER (PARTITION BY Email) AS Active_Check
					FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE 
					WHERE Email IS NOT NULL
					AND Email NOT LIKE '%inactive%'
					AND Email NOT LIKE '%test%'
					
					) M 
				--WHERE Active = Active_Check
				
				) M1
			
			) M2
		
	WHERE RW=1
	) M3

ON E1.WorkEmail = M3.Email
AND E1.Division = M3.Division
WHERE E1.WorkEmail IS NOT NULL AND E1.WorkEmail!='';




--************************************Update based on exact FN, Exact LN


UPDATE MX 
SET MX.EmployeeID_LP_REF = M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD
FROM
EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE MX
JOIN

(
	SELECT E.EmployeeID , E1.EmployeeID AS EmployeeID_To_UPD FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE  E
	JOIN 
		(
		SELECT * FROM 
					(
					SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName))),Division  ORDER BY Active DESC,Email DESC) AS RW, 
					Firstname,LastName,CONCAT(Ltrim(Rtrim(E.FirstName)),' ',Ltrim(Rtrim(E.LastName)))as Fullname, EmployeeId, Division, Email, Zip, Active
					FROM EDW.DIM_EMPLOYEE E
					--WHERE Active=1
					) EX
			WHERE RW=1
			
			) E1
	ON 		E.Division = E1.Division
	AND  	E.Firstname = E1.Firstname 
	AND 	E.Lastname = E1.Lastname
	WHERE 	E.EmployeeID_LP_REF IS NULL
	AND E.Firstname IS NOT NULL AND E.Firstname !=''
	AND E.Lastname  IS NOT NULL AND E.Lastname!=''
	
	) M1

ON MX.EmployeeID = M1.EmployeeID

WHERE M1.EmployeeID_To_UPD IS NOT NULL;
